tips: Punching trees is always the answer.
Never dig straight down. Unless you're feeling lucky.
Creepers just want a hug... a very explosive one.
Diamonds are forever... unless you fall in lava.
Shift is your best friend. Trust it.
Redstone engineers still don't know what they're doing.
Don't mine at night... unless you're brave. Or stupid.
Endermen hate eye contact. Be polite.
Pro tip: Water puts out fire.
Server hamsters running at full speed!
The cake is still a lie.
Taking inventory... of your life choices.
Blocks don't judge. But we do.
Exploring the infinite... one chunk at a time.
Unbreaking III doesn't fix your relationships.
Fishing is just lootboxes with water.
Avoid eye contact with Endermen or relatives.
Your dirt hut isn't safe. Sorry.
Block by block, dream by dream.
Pro builders use scaffolding. Legends use dirt.
Plant a tree. Punch it later.
You had one job — don't explode.
Ctrl+W closes your inventory. Try it! (Don't)
If you read all 50 tips, you win... nothing.
